name: weavatrix
description: Fully local repository intelligence MCP: always-fresh graph, LSP-backed impact, production-first Health, dead code, endpoints, duplicates, history and architecture safeguards.
long_description: Weavatrix builds dependency graphs of local repositories with bundled tree-sitter WASM and a bounded TypeScript/JavaScript language-server provider. It serves 34 network-free MCP tools for graph queries, source context, proof-carrying changes, Health, dependency analysis, clone review, history, architecture rules and cross-repository static contracts. The offline profile enables all local tools; pinned removes repository retargeting and cross-repository access.

repo_root.title: Repository to analyze
repo_root.description: The initial local Git repository. The offline profile can switch only through an explicit local open_repo call; select pinned to make this boundary immutable.

capabilities.title: Local security profile or capability groups
capabilities.description: Use offline (default) or pinned. Advanced: exact comma-separated graph,search,source,health,build,retarget,crossrepo. Online/Cloud/Enterprise tools belong to the separate weavatrix-online package.

precision.title: TypeScript/JavaScript semantic precision
precision.description: Use lsp (default) for the bundled bounded language-server overlay, or off for parser-only graphs.

precision_prewarm.title: Semantic prewarm budget
precision_prewarm.description: Use bounded (default) for fast startup, or full for an explicit high-budget pass over every eligible TypeScript/JavaScript target within hard time, source and memory ceilings.

allow_test_runs.title: Allow verified_change test execution
allow_test_runs.description: Set to 1 only when verified_change may execute explicitly requested test/check/verify package.json scripts. Default 0 keeps the workflow read-only.
